nodes.label: AI as literature synthesis partner
nodes.grounding_span: it can synthesise information so quickly and serve as a great diving board into various sources

nodes.label: AI for data analysis and figure creation
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to look silly by having some sort of silly mistake in the figure where the data is misrepresented

nodes.label: AI for writing and final checks
nodes.grounding_span: having it write the whole thing makes me feel like I am no longer the one steering the conclusions drawn from my research

nodes.label: AI as endless revision suggester
nodes.grounding_span: it makes it sort of like a hedonic treadmill of fixing things and then fixing more things

nodes.label: AI for experimental design ethics checking
nodes.grounding_span: having an ethics bot that double checks experiment designs against general guidelines

nodes.label: AI as specialized research phase tool
nodes.grounding_span: having a dedicated frame work of models with slightly different system instructions for each step within the research process

nodes.label: Efficient and finalizing writing process
nodes.grounding_span: having one or two checking steps and then having the AI affirm that everything looks good

nodes.label: Ethical research conduct
nodes.grounding_span: double checks experiment designs against general guidelines and highlights grey areas

nodes.label: Seamless research workflow integration
nodes.grounding_span: help provide nice punctuation between steps of the research process
